note: Display metadata for plant collections (cultivar/genus clusters). MEMBERSHIP lives on each plant.json as `collection:"<id>"`; this file only names the group, places it in a home section, picks the lead photo, and gives the blurb. See CLAUDE.md › Collections.

apples.name: Apples
apples.blurb: Cold-hardy apple cultivars (Malus domestica) for the Front Range.

plums.name: Plums
plums.blurb: Hardy European & hybrid plums (Prunus) for our climate.

currants.name: Currants & gooseberries
currants.blurb: Ribes and their kin — currants, gooseberry, and the jostaberry hybrid.

pelargoniums.name: Pelargoniums
pelargoniums.blurb: Tender 'geraniums' (Pelargonium) — bedding, scented, ivy & regal types.

wallflowers.name: Wallflowers
wallflowers.blurb: Erysimum — fragrant cottage-garden wallflowers, perennial & biennial.

tulips.name: Tulips
tulips.blurb: Garden hybrid and perennializing species tulips.

crocuses.name: Crocuses
crocuses.blurb: Early snow crocus and big Dutch crocus for the first bees.

penstemons.name: Penstemons
penstemons.blurb: Beardtongues — Western native and garden penstemons.
